programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Marella unofficially asks String and Dom to attempt a rescue mission when Archangel is captured by rival agents and his wing of the Firm is disavowed Archangel had embarked on a rescue mission for a former lover which he later discovers is a trap to lure him to his capture and subsequent brainwashing String and Dom must find Archangel and deprogram him before he can assassinate the Firms top leader Zeus

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: OPReEpisode
programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters he sets into motion a plan of revenge against Lyndah

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot he reconsiders his role in the repo business

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Clarence Millies mop boy is wearing a gun he just cleaned for a customer When he accidentally kills a famous outlaw some locals play up their new friends reputation hoping for more fun as they expect his partner to come to town

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E01 Perce
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E01 Perce

programme.title: Bonanza 315
programme.desc: Bonanza 315

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Arte are assigned to protect a soon to be crowned King But first they must stop a kidnapping plot to force him to renounce his throne

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is blackmailed into slaving for a physician obsessed with curing a deadly strain of meningitis prevalent in a remote Mexican province The fugitive put ashore in Mexico after fleeing US police and swapping places with a departing sailor The expatriate Dr Howell will stop at nothing to wipe out his tiny enemy but Richard Kimble contests the ethics of Howells fanatical methods as a wily local police sergeant closes in on the convicted killer

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While on a diving assignment in a foreign country Mike Nelson unwillingly becomes involved in proving that the countrys military ruler is guilty of murdering a member of the opposition party

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Shortly after a skin diver steals lobsters from an old fisherman as part of a secret club initiation he disappears Mike Nelson finds his spear gun near the lobster pots and the fisherman is accused of murder

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Suffering from fatigue General Savage is ordered to take leave and decides to pay a visit to sunny Scotland On his way he repeatedly bumps into a female British officer Ann Macrae who is returning to her home - accidental encounters that become increasingly awkward Naturally their animosity slowly turns to grudging tolerance and then to fondness on the way to true affection Against his better judgment Savage finds himself falling in love and Macrae is caught in the same web Unfortunately she is hiding a secret that will cast a terrible shadow over their budding relationship

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Jeremiah regrets coming on to Josette but Angelique tells him that Josette acted that way at home Barnabas teaches Ben the alphabet Jeremiah tries to stop Barnabas from marrying Josette

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A telephone cable washes up on the island after a bad storm The castaways try to use it to call home for help

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E37
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E37

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E27
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E27

programme.title: Smart 503
programme.desc: Smart 503

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch investigates the disappearance of two Baywatch lifeguards without a trace in the water going after cries of drowning When Donna also goes missing Mitch investigates an old auto accident with one survivor who may hold a clue to the disappearances

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After being denied a raise Carlos goes after Ronnies reputation in a vengeful act of spite First when an unexpected guest arrives at Ronnie and Froys repo theyre scrambling to uncover her true identity Later Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac whose drastic approach to save his car sends Matt running for the hills And finally when Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van will their personal problems result in a catastrophic loss TV-14-L

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo Carlos tries to make amends

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Daan leaves and doesnt being Liam along Zoor is frantic as to why Daan left Liam wants to help but Zoor doesnt trust him because he doesnt have a CVI so Liam agrees to be implanted But his CVI enables Zoor to see and hear what Liam does So he tells Renee She tells Street who comes up with a plan to make double of Liam which doesnt have a CVI so with the double they try to find Daan

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While running from the police Kimble borrows another mans wallet to pay for a train ticket He goes to great lengths to return the wallet and money but in so doing he sees the man murdered and becomes the chief suspect in his death

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A poetry-loving stranger on the run from the Cavalry camps out at the Barkley ranch

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A cop who finds out that he has a terminal illness sets out to kill a racketeer whos been his quarry for the last year and a half

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: The ZOCHI Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.desc: The Guardians try to help a planet whose elfin inhabitants have been conquered by the Renegades who have stolen the elves amazingly powerful Tramulet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Trindles recover their Tramulet with the Guardians help and turn Cy-Kills plans against him
